name: aws-cost-saver
description: 173 AWS cost optimization checks with Compute Optimizer ML integration, data transfer analysis, and reservation purchase recommendations.

interface.shortDescription: Find AWS waste with 173 read-only cost checks.
interface.longDescription: Scans an AWS account across 11 domains (compute, storage, database, networking, serverless, reservations, containers, advanced databases, analytics, data pipelines, storage-advanced) using Compute Optimizer ML rightsizing, Cost Explorer USAGE_TYPE breakdown, and Reservation/Savings Plan purchase recommendations. Read-only by design — never modifies or deletes resources. Every finding is priced from the AWS Pricing API or a verified table (never guessed).
defaultPrompt: Scan my AWS account for cost savings.
Find the top 5 idle resources I can shut down today.
Validate the savings estimates in findings.json against the AWS Pricing API.
